since_last: 70% of 101 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +5.00%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 70% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.66% · BTC +2.43% · Gold +1.57% · Nasdaq100 +1.61%. 70% of 101 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +5.00%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +5.00%; weakest is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at -1.16%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: TER is the standout at +11.25%
cards.body: Leaders: TER +11.25%, SKHY +10.29%, CBRS +9.33%, MU +9.26%, AMAT +7.31%. Laggards: OKTA -5.24%, CHKP -3.76%, PANW -3.48%, S -3.29%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +6.58% at $127.74
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +6.58% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
